claim: Lemma (Vibe Research) is a multi-agent research system that spins up teams of AI agents to plan, search, read papers, synthesize, execute code, and validate results autonomously
actionable: Use Lemma's fully automated research system (FARS) mode for exploratory research projects; start with proposal mode to review the plan before running expensive experiments
source_title: AI Research Papers Are Here (And They're Scary Good)

claim: Agents running research autonomously (without step-by-step human direction) generated a 9-page professional research paper including abstract, intro, methodology, results, graphs, and conclusions from a single research prompt
actionable: For exploratory research questions, prompt multi-agent systems to generate full research proposals and papers; use output as a starting point for human research or validation
source_title: AI Research Papers Are Here (And They're Scary Good)

claim: The FARS mode (fully automated research system) begins with a proposal phase; reviewing proposals before advancing to expensive experiments prevents wasted compute on flawed research plans
actionable: Always use proposal review as a checkpoint before committing resources to long-running agent research tasks; iterate on the plan before running 1-2 day experiments
source_title: AI Research Papers Are Here (And They're Scary Good)

claim: An experiment on LLM uncertainty prompting found that forcing explicit refusal (strict binary abstention) reduces false answer rate by 18-51% but over-abstains on long-tail knowledge questions
actionable: Consider prompting LLMs to explicitly refuse unknown answers rather than speculating; accept the trade-off of reduced hallucinations for missing some long-tail answers
source_title: AI Research Papers Are Here (And They're Scary Good)

claim: Lemma runs research in a virtual execution environment (not on user hardware) with remote computing, allowing complex experiments to run in the background while users work elsewhere
actionable: Leverage cloud-based agent research platforms when you have time to wait for results; queue multi-day experiments that don't block your local machine
source_title: AI Research Papers Are Here (And They're Scary Good)
